title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: Charity Cake Sale
questions.text: Bring cakes to Room 10 before morning break on Friday. Please write your name and any ingredients people might be allergic to on the box. Cakes will be sold at lunchtime.
questions.question: What must students do?

options.A: Label cakes with useful information before selling.
options.B: Sell cakes from Room 10 before break.
options.C: Buy ingredients from the school at lunchtime.

questions.explanation: Students need to write names and allergy information on boxes.

questions.heading: Message from Kai to Olivia
questions.text: Olivia, the bus to the shopping centre is running late, so I’m walking there instead. I’ll probably arrive about ten minutes after you. Could you wait near the bookshop?
questions.question: Why is Kai texting Olivia?

options.B: To explain why he will arrive later.
options.A: To ask her to take the bus instead.
options.C: To cancel their shopping centre trip.

questions.explanation: Kai says the late bus means he will arrive after Olivia.

questions.heading: Computer Printing
questions.text: Students can print homework in the library before school or during break. Printing is not available at lunchtime because library staff are running reading groups then.
questions.question: What does the notice explain?

options.C: Printing is possible only at certain times.
options.A: Reading groups have moved to lunchtime.
options.B: Students cannot print homework anymore at school.

questions.explanation: Printing is available before school or during break, but not lunchtime.

questions.heading: From: Hannah / Subject: Your guitar
questions.text: I’ve cleaned your guitar and changed one string, but the case is still broken. You can collect the guitar today if you carry it carefully. I’ll repair the case next week.
questions.question: What is Hannah saying?

options.A: The guitar is ready before the case is repaired.
options.B: The guitar cannot be collected until next week.
options.C: The case has already been repaired today.

questions.explanation: The guitar can be collected today, but the case is still broken.

questions.heading: Language Club Picnic
questions.text: Language club members are having a picnic in the park on Sunday. Bring food from your country to share if you can. Friends are welcome, but please tell us numbers by Friday.
questions.question: What are members asked to do?

options.B: Say how many people are coming soon.
options.A: Bring only food bought in the park.
options.C: Avoid inviting friends to the picnic.

questions.explanation: Members should tell the club numbers by Friday.
